title: HSE Consulting & Advisory
description: Strategic safety advisory — gap analysis, compliance roadmaps, risk assessments, and culture transformation programs tailored to your industry and risk profile.

title: Audits & Gap Analysis
description: Comprehensive HSE compliance audits, ISO gap analysis, and operational risk assessments that identify vulnerabilities before they become incidents.

title: Training & Certification Coaching
description: NEBOSH, IOSH, ASP/CSP, ISO Lead Auditor, and corporate training programs delivered globally — online, in-person, and blended. 97%+ first-attempt pass rate.

title: AI Solutions for HSE
description: Custom AI agents, predictive analytics, automated document review, and AI-powered incident analysis tools that transform how your organisation manages safety.

title: Management System Implementation
description: End-to-end implementation of ISO 45001, ISO 14001, and ISO 9001 — from initial gap analysis through to certification and beyond.

title: Incident Investigation & RCA
description: Professional incident investigation using ICAM, bow-tie, and RCA methodologies — rapid deployment, thorough analysis, and actionable corrective measures.

title: Digital HSE Transformation
description: Digitise your safety management with Power Apps, SharePoint portals, digital workflows, and inspection platforms — from paper-based to fully digital.

title: Power BI HSE Dashboards
description: Real-time HSE dashboards for incident tracking, leading indicators, training compliance, and executive KPI reporting — connected to any data source.

title: SharePoint HSE Portals
description: Centralised SharePoint sites for document management, incident reporting, risk registers, contractor management, and training records — with Teams integration.

title: Corporate HSE Solutions
description: Comprehensive enterprise partnerships covering consulting, training, digital transformation, and AI — under a single long-term corporate contract.

title: Custom Safety Apps
description: Mobile-first safety apps built for your workflow — inspection forms, permit-to-work, hazard reporting, and competency tracking on any device.

title: Certification Exam Coaching
description: 1:1 and group coaching for NEBOSH, IOSH, ASP/CSP, CRSP, ISO Lead Auditor, and PMP — structured programs with mock exams and personalised feedback.
